debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
nontriviality H
  obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded ⟨z, hz⟩)
  rw [mul_assoc]
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hC hf_bounded).trans ?_
  gcongr
  rw [ComplexMeasure.norm_def]
  refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) ?_
  convert cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  simp

by_cases hH : Nontrivial H
  · haveI := hH
    rcases spectrum.nonempty a with ⟨z, _⟩
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded z)
    refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded) ?_
    rw [mul_assoc]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg x), ← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg y),
      ← ENNReal.toReal_mul]
    apply ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top)
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · have : Subsingleton H := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp hH
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0, Subsingleton.elim y 0]

rcases subsingleton_or_nontrivial H with hH | hH
  · have : x = 0 := Subsingleton.elim x 0
    simp [this]
  · have hC : 0 ≤ C := by
      haveI : Nontrivial (H →L[ℂ] H) := inferInstance
      obtain ⟨z⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
      exact le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded z)
    let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
    apply le_trans (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm μ f)
    apply le_trans (ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top (Measure.try_apply_ne_top _ _) ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top) _)
    · apply lintegral_mono (fun z => (ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_le_toReal ENNReal.coe_ne_top).mpr (hf_bounded z))
    · rw [lintegral_const, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal hC, mul_comm]
      gcongr
      · exact hC
      · rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_le_toReal (Measure.try_apply_ne_top _ _), ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _)]
        exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := by
    nontriviality H
    exact (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded ⟨(spectrum.nonempty a).some, (spectrum.nonempty a).some_mem⟩)
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f).trans ?_
  rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by positivity : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C)]
  apply ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top _)
  calc ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation
    _ ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation := lintegral_mono fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal C * μ.variation Set.univ := lintegral_const _ _
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) := by
      gcongr
      exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _), ENNReal.ofReal_mul hC]

  obtain ⟨z⟩ := spectrum.nonempty ℂ a
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded z)
  apply le_trans (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded)
  rw [mul_assoc]

  apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded)

  · have ⟨z⟩ := Spectrum.nonempty_spectrum a

by_cases hH : Nontrivial H
  · have : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) := spectrum.nonempty a
    obtain ⟨z, _⟩ := this

    refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm _ _) ?_
    refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) hC) ?_
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul hC, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]

      _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := lintegral_const _
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
  · have : Subsingleton H := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp hH
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0, Subsingleton.elim y 0]

cases le_or_lt 0 C with
  | inl hC =>
    refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hX hf_bounded) ?_
    gcongr
    change (_.variation Set.univ).toReal ≤ _
    refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) ?_
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (by positivity)]
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  | inr hC =>
    have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => (norm_nonneg _).trans_le (hf_bounded z) |>.not_lt hC⟩
    haveI : Subsingleton H := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp fun _ => (spectrum.nonempty a).not_isEmpty ‹_›
    simp [Subsingleton.eq x 0, Subsingleton.eq y 0, Subsingleton.eq (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) 0]

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  rcases subsingleton_or_nontrivial H with hH | hH
  · simp [Subsingleton.eq_zero x, Subsingleton.eq_zero y, Subsingleton.elim (μ.integral f) 0]
  obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded ⟨z, hz⟩)
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f).trans ?_
  rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) hC)]
  apply ENNReal.toReal_mono ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation ≤ ∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation :=
      lintegral_mono fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal hC (hf_bounded z)
    _ = μ.variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by rw [lintegral_const, Measure.restrict_univ]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul hC, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]
      rfl

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  have h_bound : (μ.variation Set.univ).toReal ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    have h := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_toReal_le (ComplexMeasure.finite_variation μ).ne_top (by positivity)]
    simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _)]
    exact h
  by_cases hx : x = 0
  · simp [hx, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
    have : μ = 0 := by
      apply ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_eq_zero_of_forall_integral_eq_zero
      intro g
      simp [μ, cfc_toComplexMeasure, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply, hx]
    simp [this]
  · haveI : Nontrivial H := nontrivial_of_ne _ _ hx
    haveI : Nontrivial (H →L[ℂ] H) := ContinuousLinearMap.nontrivial
    have : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) := spectrum.nonempty a
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded (Classical.choice this))
    calc ‖μ.integral f‖
      ≤ ∫ z, ‖f z‖ ∂μ.variation := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm f
    _ ≤ ∫ z, C ∂μ.variation := MeasureTheory.integral_mono_of_nonneg
          (MeasureTheory.Integrable.of_bound (MeasureTheory.integrable_const _) hX.norm (fun z => hf_bounded z))
          (MeasureTheory.integrable_const C)
          (fun z => norm_nonneg _) (fun z => hf_bounded z)
    _ = (μ.variation Set.univ).toReal * C := MeasureTheory.integral_const C
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * C := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_bound hC

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  haveI : IsFiniteMeasure μ.var := inferInstance
  rw [mul_assoc]
  calc ‖μ.integral f‖
    _ ≤ ∫ z, ‖f z‖ ∂μ.var := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm f
    _ ≤ ∫ _, C ∂μ.var := integral_mono_of_nonneg (Eventually.of_forall fun _ => norm_nonneg _)
        ((Integrable.const C _).of_bound hX.aestronglyMeasurable (Eventually.of_forall fun z => (hf_bounded z).trans (le_abs_self C)))
        (Eventually.of_forall hf_bounded)
    _ = (μ.var Set.univ).toReal * C := by rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
      by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
      · apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
        have := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
        apply ENNReal.toReal_mono (by simp) at this
        rwa [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg _),
             ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg _)] at this
      · have : μ.var Set.univ = 0 := by
          by_contra h; obtain ⟨z⟩ := Measure.ne_zero_iff_nonempty.mp h
          linarith [(norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z)]
        simp [this]

  apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_bound _ hC hf_bounded).trans

  rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]

  · exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y

  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded (spectrum.nonempty a).some)
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded).trans ?_

apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hX hf_bounded)
  rw [mul_comm]
  gcongr
  refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by finiteness) ?_

by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · rw [mul_assoc]
    apply (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hC hf_bounded).trans

      (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)
  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => (norm_nonneg _).not_lt ((hf_bounded z).trans_lt (not_le.mp hC))⟩

rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h_empty | h_nonempty
  · haveI : Subsingleton H := (Module.subsingleton_iff_isEmpty_spectrum_of_isAlgClosed ℂ H a).mpr h_empty
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0, MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral, MeasureTheory.Integral.integral]
  · rw [mul_assoc]
    refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded) (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ?_ ?_)
    · rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
      refine le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le _ _) ?_
      simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap]
      convert mul_le_mul (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y)
        (ContinuousLinearEquiv.opNorm_le_bound _ zero_le_one (fun x => le_of_eq (by simp)))
        (norm_nonneg _) (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _)) using 1
      simp
    · exact le_trans (norm_nonneg (f h_nonempty.some)) (hf_bounded h_nonempty.some)

nontriviality H
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded (spectrum.nonempty a).some)
  apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded)
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
  rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
  refine le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le _ _) ?_
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_of_isometry (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toLinearIsometry, mul_one]
  exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h_empty | h_nonempty
  · have : Subsingleton H := by
      have : (1 : H →L[ℂ] H) = 0 := by
        rw [← map_one (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal), Subsingleton.elim (1 : C(spectrum ℂ a, ℂ)) 0, map_zero]
      refine Subsingleton.intro (fun u v => by
        rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.one_apply u, this, ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply]
        rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.one_apply v, this, ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply])
    rw [Subsingleton.elim x 0, Subsingleton.elim y 0]
    simp
  · have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded h_nonempty.some)
    have h_bound : ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) := calc
      ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation
      _ ≤ ∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation := lintegral_mono (fun z =>
            ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal C * μ.variation Set.univ := lintegral_const _ _
      _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) := by
            gcongr
            exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y

    have h_fin : ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) ≠ ⊤ := by
      apply ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
      apply ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top

    apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f)
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ne_top_of_le_ne_top h_fin h_bound) h_fin]
    refine le_trans h_bound (le_of_eq ?_)
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul hC, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x)]
    congr 1; ring

nontriviality H
  have hne : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) := spectrum.nonempty a
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded hne.some)
  let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  have hμ : ‖μ‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]
    refine le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le _ _) ?_
    simp only [LinearIsometryEquiv.norm_toContinuousLinearMap, mul_one, cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound]
  calc ‖μ.integral f‖
    ≤ ∫ z, ‖f z‖ ∂μ.var := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_norm_integral_norm f
  _ ≤ C * (μ.var Set.univ).toReal := MeasureTheory.integral_le_const μ.var hC hf_bounded
  _ = C * ‖μ‖ := by rw [ComplexMeasure.norm_eq_totalVariation]
  _ ≤ C * (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hμ hC
  _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by ring

rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h_empty | h_nonempty
  · have : Subsingleton H := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp (fun _ =>
      h_empty.false (Spectrum.nonempty a).some)
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral, MeasureTheory.integral, Subsingleton.elim x 0]
  · have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded (Classical.choice h_nonempty))
    apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded)
    rw [mul_comm, mul_assoc]
    gcongr
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg x), ← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg y),
      ← ENNReal.toReal_mul]
    apply ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top)
    convert cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    simp [ENNReal.ofReal]

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := by
    by_contra! hC
    have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => ((norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded z)).not_lt hC⟩
    have : Subsingleton H := by
      refine (subsingleton_or_nontrivial H).resolve_right (fun _ => (Spectrum.nonempty a).false)
    simp [μ.integral_of_isEmpty, Subsingleton.eq x 0]
  calc
    ‖μ.integral f‖ ≤ (∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation).toReal := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation).toReal := by
      gcongr
      rw [ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_le_toReal hC]
      exact hf_bounded _
    _ = (ENNReal.ofReal C * μ.variation Set.univ).toReal := by rw [lintegral_const]
    _ ≤ (ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ)).toReal := by
      gcongr
      exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
      rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (by positivity), mul_comm, ENNReal.toReal_mul_of_real hC]
      ring

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y

  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm _ _).trans ?_
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity)
  calc ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation
    _ ≤ ∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation := lintegral_mono fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
    _ = μ.variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by rw [lintegral_const, Measure.restrict_univ, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := by
      gcongr
      exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by

      rfl

by_cases h : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a)
  · have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded h.some)
    rw [mul_assoc]
    apply le_trans (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hC hf_bounded)
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
    refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) ?_
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := not_nonempty_iff.mp h
    simp [integral_of_isEmpty]
    have : Subsingleton (H →L[ℂ] H) := spectrum.spectrum_eq_empty_iff.mp (Set.eq_empty_of_isEmpty this)
    have : Subsingleton H := ⟨fun x y => by
      have : (1 : H →L[ℂ] H) = 0 := Subsingleton.elim _ _
      rw [← one_apply x, ← one_apply y, this, zero_apply, zero_apply]⟩
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]

by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded)
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
    rw [ComplexMeasure.norm_def]
    refine ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) ?_
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _)]
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := by
      rw [← not_nonempty_iff_isEmpty]; intro h

    simp
    have : x = 0 := by
      have := spectrum.eq_empty_iff.mp (Set.eq_empty_of_isEmpty (spectrum ℂ a))
      simpa using congr_fun (Subsingleton.elim (1 : H →L[ℂ] H) 0) x
    simp [this]

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm _).trans ?_
  rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal]
  · calc
      ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation
        ≤ ∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation := lintegral_mono fun z ↦ ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
      _ = μ.variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
          by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
          · rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (by positivity), ENNReal.ofReal_mul hC]; ring
          · rw [ENNReal.ofReal_eq_zero.2 (le_of_lt (not_le.1 hC)), mul_zero]
            refine (ENNReal.ofReal_eq_zero.2 ?_).symm
            exact mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (by positivity) (le_of_lt (not_le.1 hC))
  · exact ne_top_of_lt (lintegral_const_lt_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top (measure_ne_top _ _))
  · exact ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top

let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  by_cases h : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a)
  · obtain ⟨z, _⟩ := h
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded z)
    refine le_trans (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded) (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ?_ hC)
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ne_top_of_le_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)) ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top]
    simpa using cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · have : x = 0 := by
      by_contra hx
      haveI := nontrivial_of_ne x 0 hx
      exact (spectrum.nonempty a).ne_empty (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h)
    simp [this]

nontriviality H
  have : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) := spectrum.nonempty a
  obtain ⟨z⟩ := this
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded z)
  let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  calc ‖μ.integral f‖
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation).toReal := VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation).toReal := by
      apply ENNReal.toReal_mono
      · exact ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top (ne_top_of_le_ne_top ENNReal.coe_ne_top (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y))
      · apply lintegral_mono; intro z; exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
    _ = (ENNReal.ofReal C * μ.variation Set.univ).toReal := by rw [lintegral_const]
    _ ≤ C * (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) := by
      rw [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal hC]
      gcongr
      rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)),
          ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x)]
      apply ENNReal.toReal_mono ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
      exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by ring

by_cases h : Nontrivial H
  · haveI := h
    haveI : Nontrivial (H →L[ℂ] H) := ContinuousLinearMap.nontrivial
    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded ⟨z, hz⟩)
    refine le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hf_bounded _) ?_
    rw [mul_assoc]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
    · rw [← ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ComplexMeasure.variation_lt_top _ _) (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top)]
      rw [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg _), ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg _)]
      exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    · exact hC
  · haveI := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp h
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]

by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · rw [mul_assoc]
    apply le_trans (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded)
    gcongr
    have := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    rw [ComplexMeasure.norm_def]
    refine le_trans (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) this) ?_
    simp
  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := by
      rw [← not_nonempty_iff]
      intro h; obtain ⟨z⟩ := h
      linarith [norm_nonneg (f z), hf_bounded z]
    simp

refine le_trans (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded) ?_
  by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
    refine le_trans (ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top) (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)) ?_
    simp only [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, norm_nonneg]
  · have : Subsingleton H := by
       rw [← not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton]
       intro h_non
       have : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) := Spectrum.nonempty a
       obtain ⟨z⟩ := this
       linarith [norm_nonneg (f z), hf_bounded z]
    have : x = 0 := Subsingleton.elim _ _
    simp [this]

by_cases h : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a)
  · obtain ⟨z⟩ := h
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg _) (hf_bounded z)
    let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
    calc ‖μ.integral f‖
      ≤ (∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation).toReal := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm _ _
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation).toReal := by
        refine ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top (ne_of_lt (ComplexMeasure.variation_lt_top _ _))) ?_
        apply lintegral_mono
        intro z
        exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
    _ = C * (μ.variation Set.univ).toReal := by
        rw [lintegral_const, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal hC]
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
        rw [mul_comm (‖x‖ * ‖y‖)]
        gcongr
        rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ne_of_lt (ComplexMeasure.variation_lt_top _ _)) (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top)]
        exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := not_nonempty_iff.mp h
    have : Subsingleton H := by
      by_contra h_nontriv
      haveI := not_subsingleton_iff_nontrivial.mp h_nontriv
      exact (spectrum.nonempty a).ne_empty this
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0, ComplexMeasure.integral_of_isEmpty]

rw [mul_assoc]
  refine (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hf_bounded _).trans ?_
  gcongr
  rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by positivity)]
  apply ENNReal.toReal_mono ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
  trans ‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ
  · exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _)]; rfl
